chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP. No. D- 01 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.01.2016 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi Mr. Mushtaq Ali Tagar, Advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro Addl.A.G. a/w SIP Ghulam Shabbir Shar SHO PS Sadhoja Learned A.A.G. has filed certain documents alongwith statement of petitioner No.1 that are taken on record. This petition has been filed mainly against the harassment caused by the police of PS Sadhoja district Naushahro Feroze. The case of the petitioners is that they have contracted free will marriage and on account of which an FIR bearing Crime No. 418 of 2015 has been registered against them and on the basis of such FIR the police is causing harassment to them. SIP Ghulam Shabbir Shar SHO PS Sadhoja is present and states that he has recorded the statement of the petitioner No.1, the alleged abductee, who has confirmed that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own free will and choice and she has not been abducted by anyone. The said police official further states that in the light of such statement, he would be submitting the report before the learned Magistrate concerned disposing of the case pending against the petitioners. Counsel for petitioner in view of the above, is satisfied and does not press this petition. The instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of in these terms. JUDGE JUDGE Karar/-
